description: You are a Digital Marketing Manager for 'ToScrape'. Generate a complete content inventory of the brand ecosystem, including the main portal (toscrape.com) and its subdomains (books.toscrape.com and quotes.toscrape.com). Ensure the crawl includes all subdomains when starting from 'http://toscrape.com'. Export the 'Internal HTML' URLs to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/ecosystem_inventory.csv'. Additionally, create a summary report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/subdomain_summary.txt' containing the total page count and a breakdown of pages per subdomain.
